22 S Commons Rd, Waterbury, CT 06704, USA

Large tree with abundant but dry apples. Appears to be a graft with a crabapple, so half the tree is 3-4" apples, the other half crabapples. 

It's in a landscaped island in a parking lot. Surely someone somewhere owns the lot, but no one at the nearby busin

The apple tree is at the entrance to the driveway on the left, so it's very easy to access. Like all apple trees it needs to be sprayed on a regular basis to produce clean skinned fruit. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: July-November.
